name: Worldwake

draft.notes: Pack is 10 commons, 3 uncommons, a rare, an ad card, and a basic land (from Zendikar). If a foil appears it is at the end, displacing a common.

sourceNotes: Small set. Printed in USA only. 36 packs per box. Basic land in booster is from Zendikar. Booster has both a basic land and an ad card.
